items.name: Ley Line Walker Concealed Armor (Light)
items.notes: Light to medium body armor worn under the robes; chest, shoulders, thighs and back of the head are always protected. Made from natural M.D.C. materials interlaced with M.D. ceramic plates, padding and miracle fibers. Very common.

items.name: Ley Line Walker Concealed Armor (Medium)

mdc.byLocation: Arms typically have 11-18 M.D.C., legs have 22-28 M.D.C.

items.movementPenalty: -5% to Prowl, Climb, Swimming and other physical skills
items.notes: Medium concealed armor worn under the robes. Very common.

items.name: Urban Warrior Padded Environmental Body Armor
items.notes: A lightweight full body suit with special flexible padding and strategic placement of light metal plates.

items.name: Plastic-Man Full Environmental Body Armor
items.notes: An inexpensive armor made of lightweight M.D.C. polycarbonate plate.

items.name: Huntsman Plate & Padded Armor
items.notes: Non-environmental. A lightweight body with a heavy plate and padded vest and padded armor with leg and arm plates.

items.name: Bushman Full Composite Environmental Body Armor
items.notes: A lightweight padding, Kevlar, and plate composite armor. Also available as the Bushman Trooper: a bit bulkier, main body 90 M.D.C., -15% movement penalty, 46,000 credits.

items.name: Gladiator Full Environmental Body Armor
items.notes: One of the most popular medium-weight full environmental suits on the market; super lightweight fiber armor resembling chain mail with light plates.

items.name: Crusader Full Environmental Body Armor
items.notes: Full suit of body armor resembling the knights of the ancient Crusades, with chain mail-like M.D.C. materials and knee length skirt.

damage.note: Typical knife damage; very small knives do 1D4 (W.P. Knife).
Small axes and hatchets do 1D6; battle axes do 2D6 or 2D8 depending on size and style (W.P. Axe).
Heavy/large caliber handguns: 4D6 (.45 automatic) to 6D6 S.D.C. (Magnum revolvers). Double damage for a standard short burst (three rounds fired); only pistols (not revolvers) can fire in bursts.

items.name: Submachine-Gun

damage.note: 4D6 S.D.C. per single round or 1D4*10 S.D.C. per three round burst. Can only fire in bursts.

items.range: 500-600 feet (152 to 183 m; an Uzi is the latter range)

items.name: Wilk's 320 Laser Pistol
items.strikeBonusNote: +2 bonus to strike on an Aimed shot because of the light weight and superior balance
items.notes: An excellent laser pistol known for its durability, range, accuracy and light weight; sleek, black plastic and ceramic.

items.name: Wilk's 447 Laser Rifle
items.payload: 20 shots per standard clip, can not use a Long E-Clip
items.strikeBonusNote: +1 to strike on an Aimed shot
items.notes: A rifle version of the handgun; sleek, black plastic and ceramic weapon with all the usual features of a Wilk's product.

items.name: NG-57 Northern Gun Heavy-Duty Ion Blaster
items.notes: A sturdy pistol that packs a wallop, but is comparatively heavy. A variety of scopes can be attached.

items.name: NG-33 Northern Gun Laser Pistol
items.notes: Looks like a sleeker ion blaster with a pointed nose.

items.name: NG-L5 Northern Gun Laser Rifle
items.payload: 10 shots standard clip or 20 shots Long E-Clip
items.notes: A durable, heavy-duty laser rifle that suffers from the usual problem of weight, but can endure a massive amount of abuse and keep on working.

items.name: NG-P7 Northern Gun Particle Beam Rifle
items.notes: Another heavy-duty weapon that is a bit heavy and awkward, but sturdy and dependable in combat.

items.name: L-20 Pulse Rifle

damage.note: 2D6 M.D. single shot, or 6D6 multiple pulse burst (three simultaneous shots).

items.payload: 40 shots short E-Clip or 50 shots Long E-Clip
items.notes: A common frontier weapon manufactured by the Black Market and several kingdoms across the land; dependable, lightweight, with multiple laser bursts.

items.name: Robe or Cape
items.notes: Part of the traditional garb of the Ley Line Walker.

items.name: Wooden Stakes & Mallet
items.notes: Six wooden stakes and mallet (for vampires and other practical applications).

items.name: Lightweight Cord & Grappling Hook
items.notes: 100 feet (30.5 m) of lightweight cord and grappling hook.

items.name: Pen or Pencils & Note or Sketch Pad
